zh.lifeSummary: 當John Markham於1290年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Markham27歲，母親Sarah Switterton21歲。他和Joan Bothumsell至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1329年在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Markham was born in 1290, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Markham, was 27 and his mother, Sarah Switterton, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Bothumsell. He died in 1329, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Markham est né en 1290, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Markham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sarah Switterton, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Bothumsell. Il est décédé en 1329, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Markhamが1290年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Markhamは27歳，母Sarah Swittertonは21歳であった。彼はJoan Bothumsellとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1329年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Markham(이)가 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Markham(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Switterton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joan Bothumsell(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Markham родился в 1290 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Markham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Switterton, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Joan Bothumsell. Он умер в 1329 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
